MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Meridian Management Group is present. Represented by Ron Rogress.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lawrence David Buck is present in pro per.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of DEC-12-2011 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
